description_long: This is a dark, weathered tombstone with a rectangular base and an arched top. The front face features a prominent sculpted skull relief above a plaque with the word 'Requirements' and an epitaph, as well as the years '2022 - 2022'. The surface texture is rough and stone-like, with visible wear and subtle chipping along the edges, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The back of the tombstone is plain, lacking any inscriptions or decorative elements. The overall form is solid and monolithic, typical of grave markers found in urban cemeteries. The color is predominantly a deep, mottled gray, enhancing its somber and aged appearance.
description: A dark, arched tombstone with a sculpted skull, engraved plaque, and rough stone texture, set on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tombstone's thickness and rectangular base, with no visible inscriptions or decorations.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, arched stone surface with a rough texture and no engravings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the tombstone's thickness and solid construction.
description_view_3: Front view featuring a sculpted skull, engraved plaque with text, and the years '2022 - 2022' on a rough, arched stone face.
